title: U.S. Rescues Missing Air Force Officer Whose Fighter Jet Was Downed by Iran
summary: An Air Force officer of a F-15E Strike Eagle shot down on Friday by Iran spent a day in hostile territory with little more than a pistol for protection.

title: How the CIA Helped Locate a Missing Airman After Iran Downed a U.S. Fighter Jet
summary: The intelligence agency also executed a deception campaign aimed at drawing Iranian forces away from where the missing Air Force officer was hiding.

title: Trump Seems Emboldened With New Threats in Truth Social Post Over Strait of Hormuz
summary: In an expletive-filled social media post, Mr. Trump said Iran should open the Strait of Hormuz or he will bomb bridges and power plants.

title: Stephen Miller Is Still Pursuing His Immigration Agenda, but More Quietly
summary: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

title: ICE Arrests in Texas Leave Children to Raise Their Siblings After Parents Are Detained
summary: Andrea García and her siblings are carrying on in a home reshaped by fear, loss and new responsibility.

title: What Were Bob Dylan and John Lennon Really Saying in the Back of That Limo?
summary: A film scene of Dylan and Lennon at a low moment in 1966 has held a grim fascination for fans. Beneath the repartee, a touchy issue was at stake.

title: Want to Change? Maybe Stop Trying So Hard.
summary: The self-transformation industry sells control. Real change is messier.

title: Easter Reminds Us That Resurrection Is Everywhere
summary: Marriages, careers, reputations, financial stability and dreams can all die. But that’s not the end of the story.

title: Is Christianity Making a Comeback?
summary: Some see Easter Sunday’s packed pews and overflowing chapels as a sign of a religious revival. But experts are urging caution.

title: Dozens Killed in Haiti Massacre as International Force Trickles In
summary: Gangs tore through several rural communities last weekend, underscoring the challenges that will face the new, U.N.-backed Gang Suppression Force starting to enter the country.

title: Pope Leo XIV Calls for Peace in First Easter Mass
summary: The pontiff’s Easter remarks follow a Palm Sunday homily in which he said God rejected the prayers of “those who wage war.”

title: New Owner of Shopping Plaza in Kansas City Pitches a $1.5 Billion Rescue Plan
summary: The Country Club Plaza’s sale and turnaround plans come at a consequential economic time for Kansas City, Mo., which will soon lose the Chiefs football team.

title: Pepsi Drops Sponsorship of Wireless Festival Headlined by Kanye West
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he was “deeply concerned” that the rapper known for antisemitic and racist comments had been booked to perform at the Wireless Festival.
